analytics.title: Analytics & Reports
analytics.subtitle: Gym business overview — members, subscriptions, revenue and visits

customers.title: Customers
customers.subtitle: Gym members and their contact details
customers.empty: No customers yet — add your first one.
customers.search: Search by name, phone or email

subscription.none: No active tariffs. You can skip and add a subscription later.

credentials.skipNote: Optional — you can add biometrics later.

payment.skipNote: Optional — skip if not paying now.

accessStep.skipNote: Optional — grant device access now or later.

access.title: Device access — {{name}}
access.hint: Customers are pushed to the device as Custom User 1 (custom1). Access is valid until the latest active membership's end date.

memberships.title: Memberships
memberships.noTariffs: No active tariffs. Create one in Subscriptions first.
memberships.noOtherCustomers: No other customers to transfer to.

inventory.title: Warehouse
inventory.subtitle: Stock, receipts, write-offs, stocktakes, suppliers and purchases

products.empty: No products yet — add your first one.
products.search: Search by name, SKU, barcode or category

lowStock.title: Low stock
lowStock.subtitle: Products at or below their minimum level
lowStock.empty: All products are above their minimum levels.

suppliers.empty: No suppliers yet — add your first one.

purchases.receiveConfirm: Receive this purchase and add the items to stock?

stocktakes.completeConfirm: Complete this stocktake? Stock will be adjusted to the counted values.

finance.subtitle: Income, expenses, profit, cash registers, bank accounts and reports

cash.subtitle: Cash on hand

pos.subtitle: Sell products, take payment and update stock
pos.searchProducts: Search products by name, SKU or category
pos.noProducts: No products in the warehouse yet.
pos.cartEmpty: Cart is empty — tap a product to add it.
pos.refundConfirm: Refund this sale? Stock and income will be reversed.

gifts.noTariffs: No active tariffs. Create one first.
gifts.noCustomers: No customers. Add a customer first.

auth.sessionExpiredMessage: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
auth.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email to receive a link
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.

auth.passwordUpdatedSubtitle: You can now sign in with your new password

dashboard.modulePreparingBody: The {{module}} module is being built. Its dashboard and tools will appear here soon.

cards.devicesDescription: Monitor and configure access control hardware
cards.monitoringDescription: Real-time event logs and door control
cards.accessLevelsDescription: Define who can access which rooms and when

approvals.title: Attendance approvals
approvals.description: Review and approve attendance correction requests submitted by employees.

geoZones.title: Geo-zones
geoZones.description: Define geo-fenced zones. Self-service check-ins inside any active zone are auto-approved; outside zones go to admin approval.
geoZones.clickToSetCenter: Click on map to set zone center

systemStatus.title: Operational Integrity
systemStatus.description: Deep diagnostics and orchestration of core system services.

sdkError.networkDetail: Check connection, routing, and device availability.
sdkError.authDetail: Account does not have the required device privileges.

accessLevels.pageDescription: Manage access levels for employees and visitors.
accessLevels.descriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of this access level
accessLevels.confirmDeletePrefix: Are you sure you want to delete
accessLevels.noDoorsAssigned: No doors or floors assigned yet.

monitoring.pageDescription: Live oversight of your entire security infrastructure.
monitoring.firstUseTipAfter: , then drag doors from Ungrouped into named groups to organize your workspace.
monitoring.noActivityYet: No activity yet — connect a device or wait for events.

people.title: People Management
people.description: Manage your workforce, visitors, and their security credentials.
people.selectDevicesToImport: Select devices to import users from.
people.pulledFromDevices: Pulled from devices: cards — {{cards}}, faces — {{faces}}, fingerprints — {{fingerprints}}, irises — {{irises}}
people.timeAttendanceOnlyDescription: When enabled, attendance is tracked but the door will not unlock.

selfService.checkByLocationDescription: We'll use your current location. If you're inside an authorized zone, the entry is auto-approved. Otherwise the request is sent to admin for approval.
selfService.tempPasswordNotice: You signed in with a temporary password. Please set your own password to continue.
selfService.enterCurrentAndNew: Enter your current password and a new one to update.
selfService.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
selfService.failedLoadData: Failed to load data. Please sign in again.
selfService.locationDenied: Location access denied - request will need admin approval.
selfService.sentPending: Sent - pending admin approval (you are outside any geo-zone or location was unavailable).

companyTab.initialSetupDescription: Choose how the system operates. This defines how your organization structure is built.
companyTab.singleCompanyDescription: Use this mode when deploying for a single office or site.
companyTab.groupOfCompaniesDescription: Create multiple independent companies and attach departments to each.
companyTab.createCompanyToStart: Create a company to get started.
companyTab.addFirstCompany: Add your first company to manage structure.
companyTab.enterCompanyNameToFinish: Enter your company name to finish setup.
companyTab.noDepartmentsYet: This company has no departments yet

devicesTab.devicesFleetDescription: Manage and monitor your enterprise access control hardware fleet.
devicesTab.searchByIpSerialModel: Search by IP, Serial, or Model...
devicesTab.subnetMismatchExplanation: The target device must be reachable on the same local network as the server to perform activation or registration.
devicesTab.deletionWarning: Warning: This will stop all monitoring and data collection for this device. This operation is permanent.
devicesTab.connectionLost: Connection lost. Refreshing status via polling.
devicesTab.realtimeNotReady: Realtime connection not ready. Wait a moment and try again.
devicesTab.macRequired: Device MAC address is required for activation.
devicesTab.passwordMin8: Password must be at least 8 characters.
devicesTab.pleaseEnterDevicePassword: Please enter the device password (same as used during activation)

devices.pageDescription: Manage and monitor your enterprise access control hardware fleet.
devices.searchByIpSerialModel: Search by IP, Serial, or Model...
devices.subnetReachabilityNote: The target device must be reachable on the same local network as the server to perform activation or registration.
devices.deleteWarning: Warning: This will stop all monitoring and data collection for this device. This operation is permanent.
devices.connectionLostPolling: Connection lost. Refreshing status via polling.
devices.realtimeNotReady: Realtime connection not ready. Wait a moment and try again.
devices.errorMacRequired: Device MAC address is required for activation.
devices.errorPasswordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
devices.errorEnterDevicePassword: Please enter the device password (same as used during activation)

payroll.pageDescription: Salary calculation, pay components and period management.
payroll.createNewPeriodHint: Create a new period to start calculating salaries.
payroll.tryClearingFilters: Try clearing the filters or switching the tab.
payroll.noComponentsYet: No components yet. Add allowances, bonuses and deductions.
payroll.calcDescription: Calculates salaries for all configured employees based on attendance logs. Previously calculated entries will be recalculated.
payroll.calcModeNoOvertime: No overtime — base + components, OT not paid
payroll.calcModeOvertimeOnly: Overtime only — separate OT payment without base/components
payroll.latenessTierHintFixed: Tier value = fixed amount charged for each late day.
payroll.latenessTierHintCoefficient: Tier value = multiplier × hourlyRate × lateness hours.
payroll.latenessTiersTitle: Lateness Tiers (avg min late per day)
payroll.earlyLeaveTierHintFixed: Tier value = fixed amount charged for each early-leave day.
payroll.earlyLeaveTierHintCoefficient: Tier value = multiplier × hourlyRate × early-leave hours.
payroll.earlyLeaveTiersTitle: Early-leave Tiers (avg min early per day)
payroll.payrollSummaryEmailNote: The payroll summary for {{period}} will be sent as an HTML email.
payroll.confirmApproveAllEntries: Approve all entries in this period?
payroll.confirmMarkAsPaid: Mark this period as paid? This cannot be undone.
payroll.confirmDeletePeriod: Delete this period and all its entries? This cannot be undone.

personDetail.irisImportHint: Import irises from a device via People → Import
personDetail.faceReplaceHint: Click Enroll to replace the face. It syncs when you save the profile.
personDetail.faceCaptureHint: Click Enroll to capture a face from the device.
personDetail.timeAttendanceOnlyHint: When enabled, attendance is tracked but the door will not unlock.
personDetail.selfServicePortalHint: The employee can submit check-in, check-out, leave, and other requests.
personDetail.savePasswordHint: Save this password — it will not be shown again.
personDetail.defaultWorkScheduleHint: Used as the default schedule in time attendance reports. Per-day overrides can be set in the Schedule Planner.
personDetail.deleteProfileHint: Deleting the profile revokes all access rights and credentials.
personDetail.enrollerListHint: Enroller list uses device type "Enroller station" or a Hikvision DS-K1F… serial/model in the name or identifier. Add the device in Devices or edit its name to include the model.
personDetail.enrollerListShortHint: Set type "Enroller station" or put DS-K1F… in the device name/identifier (see Devices).
personDetail.enrollerListShortHint2: Set type "Enroller station" or DS-K1F… in name/identifier (see Devices).
personDetail.noCompatibleDevices: No compatible devices for this capture mode (check ISAPI capabilities).
personDetail.noFaceDevices: No devices support face enrollment for this mode.
personDetail.noFingerprintDevices: No devices support fingerprint enrollment for this mode.
personDetail.faceSyncHint: The face will sync to devices from assigned access levels when you save the profile.
personDetail.allSlotsFull: All 10 fingerprint slots are full. Delete a fingerprint to add a new one.
personDetail.retireProfileMessage: Are you sure you want to permanently delete {{name}}? This will remove all cards, faces, and fingerprints from the system and from all devices.

qr.label: QR Code (visitor entry)
qr.hint: Present this QR code at the reader to enter. Synced to access control devices.

confirm.deleteFace: Delete face? It will be removed from all devices.

errors.deviceNoCardSupport: This device does not support card enrollment.
errors.deviceNoFaceSupport: This device does not support face enrollment.
errors.deviceNoFingerprintSupport: This device does not support fingerprint enrollment.
errors.maxFingerprints: Maximum 10 fingerprints on this Hikvision terminal. Delete one to add another.
errors.namesRequired: First and last name are required

workHours.pageDescription: Daily, weekly and monthly attendance reports based on device authentication logs.
workHours.schedulesIntroPrefix: Create templates (standard hours, shift, or flexible norm). Assign a schedule to an employee under
workHours.noSchedulesYet: No work schedules yet. Create one to assign in employee profiles.
workHours.noEmployeesWithSchedule: No employees with assigned schedule. Assign a schedule under People → employee → Schedule & self-service.
workHours.adminAssignedLeavesDesc: Vacations and days-off assigned by HR. Approved paid leaves count as worked days in payroll.
workHours.noLeavesYet: No leaves yet. Create one to assign vacation or day-off to an employee.
workHours.selfServiceRequestsDesc: Vacation, absence and overtime requests submitted by employees via the self-service portal.
workHours.countEarlyArrivalDesc: If off — when a person checks in before the shift start, total hours are counted from the shift start (early time is ignored for overtime).
workHours.overtimeDailyThresholdDesc: If overtime for the day is less than this threshold — it will not be counted in Time Attendance or payroll. 0 = no threshold.
workHours.lunchBreakDeductionDesc: If enabled — the lunch break duration is subtracted from actual worked time.
workHours.lunchBreakMinutesDesc: Number of lunch break minutes deducted from actual time each working day.
workHours.flexibleScheduleDesc: late arrival, early departure and overtime will not be calculated — only total worked hours per day are tracked.
workHours.offScheduleDesc: assign this schedule to specific dates — they will become day-off for the employee (not counted as absent, do not grow totalWorkingDays). Suitable for public holidays or corporate day-off.
workHours.noSubShiftsYet: No sub-shifts yet. Click "Add shift" to create one.
workHours.deleteScheduleConfirm: Delete {{name}}? Employees using this schedule will need another one assigned.
workHours.correctionOverrideHint: Override raw device authentications. Leave empty to keep auto value.
workHours.removeScheduleDesc: Clears the default schedule and all day-pattern assignments for selected employees. The attendance report will no longer show this schedule for them.
workHours.willAssignDefaultNote: Also sets as default schedule in employee profiles
workHours.sendReportHint: The report for the selected {{period}} will be sent as an HTML email.
workHours.noDatesMatch: No dates match the selected days of week in this range

systemSettings.pageDescription: Configure global parameters and manage your hardware fleet.

alerts.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

confirms.resetTemplate: Reset this template to the built-in default? Your custom version will be deleted.

localization.title: Localization & Runtime
localization.syncTimeAll: Sync time & timezone to all devices
localization.syncDescription: Sets manual mode on every Hikvision device using the selected timezone and current server UTC.
localization.dailyAutoSyncDesc: Pushes time & timezone every day at the chosen local time.

vault.title: Vault & Data Ops
vault.databaseBackupDesc: pg_dump snapshot of the primary database
vault.noBackups: No backups yet. Click "Backup now" to create one.
vault.secondaryDbDesc: PostgreSQL connection string for replica or standby

org.title: Organizational Structure
org.companyModeDesc: Defines how companies and departments are handled
org.modeNotSelected: Mode not selected. Initial setup required.
org.companyNameModalDesc: Enter the company name. This is required for Single Company mode.

smtp.title: SMTP Email Settings
smtp.subtitle: Used for password reset emails, self-service credentials, and report delivery.
smtp.enableDesc: Send emails via your SMTP server

templates.title: Email Templates
templates.subtitlePrefix: Customize the HTML body and subject for every outgoing email. Use
templates.subtitleSuffix: placeholders — they are replaced with real data at send time.
templates.subject: Subject
templates.sampleDataInPreview: Sample data is used in preview
templates.clickPreview: Click Preview to render with sample data

users.title: System users
users.subtitle: Manage administrators and operators. Self-service portal accounts (employees) are managed separately.
users.noUsers: No users yet. Click "New user" to create one.
users.changePasswordDesc: Set a new password for this user. They will need to use it on next login.
users.deleteUserConfirmSuffix: will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

roles.title: Roles
roles.subtitlePrefix: System roles ship with sensible defaults; custom roles start empty. Click
roles.subtitleSuffix: on any role to pick what its users can do.
roles.roleHasUsers: Cannot delete: role has assigned users
roles.newRoleDesc: Create a custom role. It can be assigned to users, but is not used by any built-in authorization checks.

permissions.title: Permissions — {{name}}
permissions.adminNoticeSuffix: role always has every permission and cannot be edited.
permissions.pickPrefix: Pick which actions users with the
permissions.pickSuffix: role can perform. Changes apply to all users with this role on their next page load.

audit.title: Debug logs
audit.subtitle: Audit trail of all mutating actions: who did what, when, from which IP. Read-only.
audit.noEntries: No log entries match your filter.

logSync.title: Device log synchronization
logSync.subtitle: Pulls Hikvision ACS access events into attendance records. Auto-run time is in the server's local timezone.
logSync.manualSyncDesc: Select a date range (calendar dates; day boundaries in the server's local timezone).
logSync.autoSyncDesc: Each day at the configured time the system pulls the last 24 hours of events from all devices.
